config.cache.ttl.description: Time-to-live for cached directory entries and file stats (in seconds)
config.cache.maxSize.description: Maximum size of the file content cache (in MB)
config.pool.idleTimeout.description: Time in seconds before idle connections are closed
config.security.syncConnections.descript: (Beta) Bundle secrets into the encrypted store so that connections (including passwords) sync across devices via VS Code Settings Sync. Requires master password encryption to be enabled. The same master password must be set on all devices. Note: This feature may not work reliably in all scenarios and depends on VS Code Settings Sync being active and functioning correctly.
config.watch.pollInterval.description: Polling interval for file system watchers (in milliseconds)
config.ai.enabled.description: Enable AI tools (beta). Provides dedicated file, database, and search tools for the AI agent. Disabled by default — without these tools the agent uses SSH commands directly via runCommand, which often produces better results. Requires reload.
chat.participant.description: Work with remote servers — list, read, write, delete files, create directories, search, and run commands (SSH/SFTP/FTP)
chat.command.connect.description: Connect to a remote server by name
chat.command.ls.description: List files on a remote server
tool.listFiles.userDescription: List files and directories on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.readFile.userDescription: Read contents of a file on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.writeFile.userDescription: Write content to a file on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.searchFiles.userDescription: Search for text in files on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.runCommand.userDescription: Execute a shell command on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.deleteFile.userDescription: Delete a file or directory on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.createDirectory.userDescription: Create a directory on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.renameFile.userDescription: Rename or move a file or directory on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.statFile.userDescription: Get metadata (type, size, dates, permissions) of a file on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.copyFile.userDescription: Copy a file or directory on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.findFiles.userDescription: Find files by name pattern on a remote server connected via Remote Bridge
tool.listConnections.userDescription: List all saved remote connections with their status
tool.getChangedFiles.userDescription: Get a summary of all remote files modified during this session
tool.clearDecorations.userDescription: Reset session file change tracking and remove all badges from Explorer
tool.mysqlQuery.userDescription: Execute a read-only SQL query on a MySQL/MariaDB database via Remote Bridge SSH connection
tool.mysqlExecute.userDescription: Execute a data-modifying SQL statement on a MySQL/MariaDB database via Remote Bridge SSH connection
tool.mysqlSchema.userDescription: Inspect MySQL/MariaDB database schema (databases, tables, columns) via Remote Bridge SSH connection
walkthrough.title: Get Started with Remote Bridge
walkthrough.description: Connect to remote servers over SSH, SFTP, FTP, and FTPS — and make the most of every feature.
walkthrough.step.addConnection.title: Add your first connection
walkthrough.step.addConnection.descripti:
Open the connection form to set up your first SSH, SFTP, FTP, or FTPS connection.
[Add Connection](command:remoteBridge.addConnection)
walkthrough.step.masterPassword.title: Protect with master password
walkthrough.step.masterPassword.descript:
Enable master password encryption to secure all connections with AES-256-GCM. You also get automatic encrypted backups (7 daily + 4 weekly) and the ability to sync connections across devices.
[Set Master Password](command:remoteBridge.setMasterPassword)
walkthrough.step.sync.title: Sync across devices (Beta)
walkthrough.step.sync.description:
Enable connection sync to share your connections — including passwords — across all your devices via VS Code Settings Sync. Uses the same master password on every device. Connections are merged automatically so nothing is lost.
[Open Sync Setting](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%5B%22remoteBridge.security.syncConnections%22%5D)
walkthrough.step.import.title: Import existing connections
walkthrough.step.import.description:
Already using another client? Import your connections from SSH Config, WinSCP, FileZilla, PuTTY, SSH FS, or Total Commander in a single step.
[Import Connections](command:remoteBridge.import)
